response.justification: While the candidate brings over 15 years of software engineering and entrepreneurial experience, they lack the deep, recognized artificial intelligence expertise and strategic leadership required for a Director-level AI Strategy role. Their AI experience is limited to very recent, brief exposure to agent infrastructure, which does not align with the core requirement of advising on and driving cutting-edge enterprise AI platform strategy.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as a founder
Strong track record of technical community engagement and workshops
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI and Machine Learning
Scope aligns with a Staff Full-Stack Engineer rather than a Director-level strategic IC
No proven experience advising enterprise customers on AI and cloud adoption
